description: Composition Brown printed round neck kurta made of 100% cotton, has a split neckline, three quarter sleeves, tape and mirror detail on on the chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Every girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. aurelia have been inspired by the street fads that are currently trending and have added this style to their latest collection. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
